findings.title: bitsandbytes-foundation/bitsandbytes
findings.description: Accessible large language models via k-bit quantization for PyTorch.

findings.title: facebookresearch/bitsandbytes
findings.description: Library for 8-bit optimizers and quantization routines.

findings.title: taprosoft/llm_finetuning
findings.description: Convenient wrapper for fine-tuning and inference of Large Language Models (LLMs) with several quantization techniques (GTPQ, bitsandbytes)

findings.title: EricRollei/Comfy_HunyuanImage3
findings.description: Nodes to run Hunyuan Image 3 locally with BF16 and NF4 quantized options in Comfyui

findings.title: aredden/torch-bnb-fp4
findings.description: Faster Pytorch bitsandbytes 4bit fp4 nn.Linear ops

findings.title: shaheennabi/Production-Ready-Instruction-Finetuning-of-Meta-Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct-Project
findings.description: Instruction Fine-Tuning of Meta Llama 3.2-3B Instruct on Kannada Conversations. Tailoring the model to follow specific instructions in Kannada, enhancing its ability to generate relevant, context-aware responses based on conversational inputs.  Using the Kannada Instruct dataset for fine-tuning! Happy Finetuning 🎋

findings.title: Vitgracer/Offline-Voice-LLM-Assistant
findings.description: Running small but capable language models entirely offline

findings.title: LittleLittleCloud/TorchSharp.BitsAndBytes
findings.description: Leverage BitsAndBytes 4Bit and 8Bit quantization for TorchSharp

findings.title: mpsops/mps-bitsandbytes
findings.description: 8-bit quantization for PyTorch on Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3/M4)

findings.title: MohammadMaftoun/MultiModalRAG
findings.description: This project integrates a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline using LLaMA2 (quantized via BitsAndBytes) and OpenAI's CLIP for multimodal document understanding — including both text and images.

findings.title: Abeshith/FineTuning_LanguageModels
findings.description: 🎯 Fine-tune large language models and use them for text-related tasks. This repository provides a straightforward approach to fine-tuning models like Gemma, Llama 🦙, and Mistral 🌪️ for various NLP tasks. 🔧 It includes training 📚, fine-tuning 🛠️, and inference pipelines ⚙️. 🚀

findings.title: KingdalfGoodman/Llama3.2-bitsandbytes-peft
findings.description: Example: Training Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct with this framework using 4-bit quantization and LoRA (r=32)

findings.title: bitsandbytes-foundation/bitsandbytes-intel
findings.description: An extension to enable performance acceleration for bitsandbytes on Intel platforms.

findings.title: edcalderin/huggingface-ragflow
findings.description: This project implements a classic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system using HuggingFace models with quantization techniques. The system processes PDF documents, extracts their content, and enables interactive question-answering through a Streamlit web application.

findings.title: arham-kk/llama2-qlora-sft
findings.description: This model is a fine-tuned model based on the "TinyPixel/Llama-2-7B-bf16-sharded" model and "timdettmers/openassistant-guanaco" dataset

findings.title: agrawalpraveen12/Efficient-Phi3-FineTuning-PEFT
findings.description: End-to-end fine-tuning pipeline for Microsoft Phi-3-mini using LoRA (PEFT) and 4-bit quantization with bitsandbytes, featuring an interactive Streamlit chat interface for efficient local LLM deployment.

findings.title: kalaiselvan-t/openvla-fr3
findings.description: FR3 robot in Gazebo integrated with 4-bit quantized OpenVLA and MoveIt

findings.title: AhmadShayan1112/Fine-Tuning-DeepSeek-R1-with-QLoRA
findings.description: Fine-tune DeepSeek R1 using QLoRA for efficient, low-resource training on GPUs like NVIDIA P100. Leverages Hugging Face, PEFT, and bitsandbytes for 4-bit quantized LoRA training with mixed precision. Includes model saving, evaluation, and custom dataset support.

findings.title: lpalbou/model-quantizer
findings.description: Effortlessly quantize, benchmark, and publish Hugging Face models with cross-platform support for CPU/GPU. Reduce model size by 75% while maintaining performance.

findings.title: leeroopedia/workflow-huggingface-diffusers-model-quantization
findings.description: Reduce diffusion model VRAM usage by 2-4x through multi-backend weight quantization (BitsAndBytes, TorchAO, Quanto, GGUF)
